1,860 square kilometers. We are 1st in Europe. Now, our esteemed Deputy Orhan Bey has just stated about food. In terms of food, we are currently ranked 1st in Europe in terms of inflation. What are we talking about, friends? Look, you plundered 1,860 square kilometers of nature during the time we adopted the Presidential system. After that, we will stand up, and in good faith, we will expect positive things from the sentences you used in such a law.
Many details have been gone into, and maybe it will happen again, but when we look at the past, we also see the future. This is our concern, because we need to leave this country entrusted to us to future generations in a healthy way, without plundering nature, by protecting nature. We travel the world, we all travel, and when I come to my country after seeing the love and embrace of nature there, it hurts my heart. Well, we were in Abant last week, but we also took care of Abant.

Now, there is a regulation regarding HGS here, the application regarding HGS has already been made in Abant Nature Park. Dear Deputy, what are we sharing right now? As I said, many things have actually been prepared, they have been cooked in the kitchen, now we are looking at how we can fix that cooked food again, how we can complete the deficiencies or how we can solve this, or you have sewn the outfit for the child, now that outfit does not fit or we are trying to make changes to the outfit that fits. So we need to be more careful about that. Look, in this proposal, you are creating a new structure with a special budget by saying you protect national parks. In short, you are running away from inspections, inspections. You are establishing a revolving fund, I just corrected it, the sentence that the then Minister of Treasury and Finance Lütfi Elvan said in 2021 was: "We will close the revolving fund, we will abolish it." We look at the point we have reached, you are back to revolving fund. I wonder why? I'm curious, and I especially expect an explanation from you.
Again, the preliminary signs of this law began to emerge months ago. How? You must have forgotten the forest engineers in the recent senior management appointments and new technical personnel recruitments at the General Directorate of Nature Conservation and National Parks, these people were excluded. If we are going to protect these forests, this nature, the main responsible people here should be forest engineers who know the subject. Why didn't you hire these forest engineers then? Why did it escape your attention? But here's the thing: Our friends who came from theology or were trained in physical education were employed in certain institutions, agricultural institutions, before. Here again, merit was abandoned and other paths were chosen. At this point, forest engineers, who brought the concept of "national park" to Türkiye for the first time since 48, were excluded and excluded during your period. As a result, this proposal was presented to us, which separated the institution from the Ministry and turned it into a private budget institution. So, you are removing obstacles one by one, paving the way for others, friends, this is the truth. I also wonder, which people are under this law? In the past, ports were rented and privatized. In the past period, we made additional dates to their privatization dates, and we explained them here. So, these enterprises were under the responsibility of the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry until now, and now we are creating a new structure. You are always ready to create and create structures - you are like an amoeba, thank God - and at this point, we are destroying the country's resources one by one by creating new things.
Look again, don't go too far, let me give you an example from Ankara: We all saw, watched and experienced what was done at Atatürk Forest Farm. How? The Ministry defined some areas as special social facility areas in 2024. Who did he give it to? At that time, I don't want to say anything, he allocated it to Medipol University and TÜRK-İŞ Confederation. In this process, trees aged 25-30 years were brutally slaughtered. That's why I say, your record is already dark.

In this process, these trees were destroyed, construction activities accelerated, court decisions and expert reports were ignored and ignored; just like in the Kaz Mountains. There is still a stay of execution, but the plunder continues in the Kaz Mountains. The company that bought that job there, that bought the mining operation; Believe me, there are no such roads in our villages, Mr. Deputy, there are no such roads in the villages.
Dear Commission members. Go and look at the roads built and opened there, you can land planes until you reach the water channels, roads have been built in the Kaz Mountains. So your record is dark, that's why we have problems. You ignore court decisions, those expert reports do not exist anyway. Again, there are many NGOs whose opinions should be taken on this law. Where are the people whose opinion was taken, where are these associations or where are these organizations? Is this law so urgent? I wonder.
Look again, you privatized the lands of Atatürk Forest Farm piece by piece and built illegal buildings on it, again ignoring its natural, historical and protected status. I am concerned that the protection of national parks is abandoned in the secret codes of this proposal. Why? Here is the past, and we passed a law about olives in the Parliament before the closure. Commission member friends said: "We will transport the olives." And which olive tree did we carry in Akbelen? I'm wondering right now. Which vehicle will you transport it with, which machine will you transport it with? I'm curious. I asked, but Varank couldn't answer me. I ask again: Hey friends, stay away from these national parks. To whom will you open the facilities here, to whom will you give them and what is expected from here? Here is what he says about illegal construction: "The General Directorate of National Parks will be active from now on, no court decision, we will demolish this place as we wish and collapse there." On what basis are you doing this, under what law are you doing this? Friends, we cannot do anything illegal.
Look, there is another definition, you bring the definition of "field guide" here, but it is empty. I guess you haven't learned your lesson, this article regarding the definition of the field guide in Çanakkale was rejected by the Constitutional Court, it will return again. So, if you don't fill in the field guide definition, this will still be a vague sentence. In other words, there are ambiguities in many parts of the law. Here too, the field guide definition is in accordance with the Constitution. Look, I say there is a law that goes back; Look at the law regarding Çanakkale and nature, it was changed there as well in the article in the Constitution, and it will be changed here too. The field guide definition is here, the phrase is hollow. As always, let the train move, the caravan will be fixed on the road, "We will fix it on the way." We continue with this logic so far. It is a law prepared in this way.
Look again, in the general justification, our esteemed first signatory deputy says: "As of 2005, there are 50 national parks, 274 nature parks, 111 nature monuments, 32 nature conservation areas, 136 wetlands, 85 wildlife development areas in our country." Well, I'm worried about their future. I am concerned about how I can pass on this legacy to my grandchildren and children in a healthy way, and I do politics for my grandchildren.

Their grandfathers were representatives at work, they fought for the protection of the resources of this country, they fought for their province, it's about being thanked and remembered, it's about being remembered, it's about being remembered well. That's it, may God have mercy on them, they did these things, they made this effort to protect the country's resources. But on the contrary, we are currently struggling with this, and our friends in one place, on the contrary, are asking, "How can we adapt this place, how can we open this, the field, the areas to tourism and how can we bring foreign currency from there?" 70 million tourists have come and visited, we will increase this, what will the infrastructure be like there, how will it go?
Now, there are also these natural parks, in Abant, Abant Su, let me give you its name, there is Erikli in Bursa, Uludağ, and so are you going to open the wetlands here to someone again, to which businesses will you open them, to whom will they be opened? Currently, our country is dealing with drought, there is a climate crisis everywhere and there are water problems in many provinces. Are you going to give these businesses to someone, to whom will you give them? In other words, they are all open-ended, left open-ended. See, it says in Article 4 that plan decisions regarding tourism investments in culture and tourism protection and development zones and tourism centers will now be finalized in accordance with the Tourism Encouragement Law No. 2634, with the positive opinion of the General Director. I mean everything, those other 5 ministries completely.
We eliminate. We are eliminating everything, the Ministry of Agriculture, and we are offering one Ministry of Tourism here to the tourism professionals; I will say so.
Friends, won't you be responsible for the buildings to be built in the natural area here? How will you check? I just said, here is what it says: "The general directorate established in national parks makes decisions quickly." He's not even waiting for the court. He also says: "If he deems it appropriate, we have no problem, we will solve it." How will you solve it? How will you solve it? According to whom will you solve it? Open-ended, ambiguous. Which one will you solve or which building will you demolish and which building will you not demolish? How will you decide, what are your criteria? I wonder if it meets this and that criteria, it won't collapse, but if it meets these criteria, it will collapse. Who will make this decision? It will give a new general directorate. Is it that simple, friends, to leave the resources of this country only to a general directorate and to the friends there? You even ignore the court, you ignore the judiciary. Past practices are already obvious; The execution has been stopped, but no one is waiting for the execution, the plunder continues. Again, in my opinion, opening these national parks to tourism is important. And to whom will it be opened, how will it be opened? Mr. President, dear Commission members; This is the biggest question mark. "The Ministry will grant permission to real and legal persons to construct touristic buildings and facilities within the plan and for public benefit in national parks and nature parks outside the cultural and tourism protection and development zones and tourism centers, after taking the opinion of the Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change in favor of private law legal entities." he says.

Friends, I guess our beaches were not enough, we destroyed the beaches, last year, this year, or rather everywhere, our forests were burned, our lungs were burned, our own science was burned in Tekirdağ, and all over Türkiye. Then I'm playing the devil's advocate a little bit from here, it means something is being done, something has been thought about and now, as I said, it is before us. Now that we have opened these places and forests, will we also open the national parks to tourism or facility areas? For what purpose will the facility areas be used? Many things are said about what will happen if there is a spa, this will happen, that will happen. The best thing is that you have disguised it as, I put it in quotation marks, public interest, public interest. Everything is resolved quickly when it is in the public interest. What this means is that I am specifically asking my dear deputy signatory Mr. Toy and other deputies for tourism purposes in the heart of national parks: Can hotels, motels and accommodation facilities be built in the heart of national parks for tourism purposes? I am curious. As I said, I am playing the devil's advocate right now. Will you allow these facilities to be built here with these openings? Who will allow it? How will it be given? These are always open-ended. In the 5th article following this article, you allow a new regulation that was not previously in the law as an extension of tourism investment. For the first time, as the last link of tourism investment in national parks and nature parks, permission will be given by the Ministry in return for a fee, in favor of real persons and private law legal entities, for the construction of transportation, electricity generation transmission line, oil and natural gas transmission line, transformer, communication, water, thermal water, waste water, infrastructure and related structures and facilities. Then, I am saying what I understand from the 5th article: As I just asked you, it is significant that hotels, motels and accommodation facilities are being built for tourism purposes in the heart of the national parks in these regions. We are not going far, we understand this when we move on to item 5, because in my opinion, what is the natural gas line doing here? The power line, water and infrastructure already exist. There is already infrastructure in the existing national parks there. What is the need to build infrastructure or a new project, transmission transmission lines, oil and natural gas transmission lines? What is the need for the oil pipeline in national parks, which I still don't understand? Oh, I understand that, then there's also this: So, you're going to open gas stations there. Yes, don't laugh, let's not laugh.
MEHMET BAYKAN (Konya) - Deers will buy gasoline.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Yes, deers and deer will probably buy gasoline or our wild goats will buy gasoline. Yes, now
We laugh at our situation, but friends, here is the truth, I am asking you this from the articles, I did not create this from outside myself, I did not bring anything different, I moved from the 4th article to the 5th article. In other words, the procedures and principles regarding the permits to be granted will be determined by the regulations to be issued by the General Directorate. Friends, these issues are so important that they cannot be left to the regulations, if they are left to the regulations, it is open-ended. Woe to my national parks, nature, natural areas, woe to my wild goats.

After that, we destroy those wild animals like in Tunceli Pertek, we kill them, we slaughter them, and then we forgive them, with the intention of blowing the whistle on the one who paid the money.
Again, the proposal also expands the authority to operate or have facilities operated within the national park border, in short, it is now open to private enterprise. Dear Minister, our President - I don't know - I think he was the Minister at that time, there was a bill regarding these shelters, fishing shelters, I don't know if he remembers, you remember, last term, in the previous period, 2018-2023. At 4 in the morning, I said a sentence to the President of the Central Union of Fisheries: "President, you are wrong, they passed the article." saying. We opened up to the outside world in the same way. The article regarding the renting of those shelters by fishermen to someone other than the cooperatives that do that job was passed. Then, anyway, he woke up and came fifty minutes later: "Well, Mr. Deputy, it is indeed true, I missed it, was deceived or slept." Then whatever. And there were examples of this, it happened in Tekirdağ, someone tried to enter - thank God, my deputy also remembers those times - and that fishing shelter was left to the Fisheries Cooperative again. So friends, with these articles and proposals here, it is still vague to say that it should be opened to the private sector and businesses. Well, then look, you have established a revolving fund, you have a revolving fund enterprise, you have a company, it has been established, then let the company run it, you have a revolving fund and a company. Why do you rent it or give it to someone else, why don't you do it yourself, why don't you do it? You can recruit staff, now you are a company after becoming the General Manager. So, if we list them, it means that there is ulterior motive again, we see ulterior motives.
We come to the 9th article of the proposal. "The General Directorate of National Parks will be able to establish revolving fund enterprises in areas where they are needed." You say, and then in the other previous article you say: "I can rent these, I can give them to other people." What kind of diet is this, what kind of sauerkraut is this? And "I will establish a revolving fund." And you say, "I'll let someone else do it." You mean there is complete chaos, friends.
Again, the President increases the amount of capital allocated to these enterprises by up to 5 times, that is, he gives you the opportunity, resources, and authority regarding this enterprise, but you say: "I can delegate the operation or authority to operate the facilities within the border of this national park." Friends, why are you delegating time? Look, don't transfer it. In the other article, we give you the authority to establish a revolving fund, plus we give the President the authority to increase the capital of the General Directorate by 5 times.
Dear Deputy, review these articles and this bill again. I think it was a bit rushed, they went into a bit too much of a holiday mode during the summer holidays, so I think it was prepared quickly, so there are so many ambiguities. It's not over yet, more items will appear as they come one after the other.
Again, see what it says: "The fields of activity, income, expenses and audit of businesses and other issues will be regulated by the regulation to be issued by the General Directorate, with the approval of the Ministry of Treasury and Finance.

"Friends, but you are missing something here again, you are leaving the controls and audits to the regulation; the opinion of the Ministry of Treasury and Finance will also be taken. But in the other place, the Ministry of Treasury and Finance is currently chasing the farmers from their producer receipts, chasing them to find resources for the product they sell, but here you are going to a different structure for someone's benefit. The regulation will be issued after their opinion is taken, and this is also harmful.
I think this is part of the revenue management process regarding opening national parks to tourism. Thus, as stated in the justification, the financial infrastructure of visitor management, ecotourism activities and other services will also be improved.
is intended from here.
When you look at Articles 12 and 19. As I said before, you will pave the way for many new tourism facilities and allow new construction, we understand that. In those articles, you are opening new facilities and new areas for the Ministry of Tourism by leaving things vague, leaving it to the regulations or being vague about opening the way for tourism facilities. It was not enough that they plundered our coasts, now you will come and we will also plunder our national parks, natural areas and parks. Friends, let's think carefully, we will raise our hands, put your conscience on the articles before you raise your hand, in the voting of this bill as a whole. You all owe a debt to this land, this country, your children and grandchildren. Please do not allow these rare areas to be plundered. See, rare areas are areas that need to be protected. I am traveling on the road in Australia, I enter the park, squirrels block me - there are those who go there - or go to New Zealand or Europe, they are in touch with nature. What are we doing? We are killing nature. In my opinion, while the road is close, let's evaluate this well and make the right decision together.
We come to Article 14. "The permits and rentals given within this scope for places that have been tendered or contracted for the purpose of building accommodation facilities by the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry, within the scope of the Tourism Encouragement Law, will be taken under the authority of the General Directorate of National Parks." But we will also get an opinion from the Ministry of Tourism, which means that when it receives an incentive certificate from the Ministry of Tourism, the road will be open and like a roadside inn. Go and get an incentive certificate from the Ministry of Culture and Tourism, go and invest there, so you have turned the business into a roadside inn.
Again, in order to realize tourism investments on areas considered forests and national parks, the rental agreements made for daily and mechanical installation purposes in accommodation and winter tourism centers by the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry, and the contracts of investor operators for whom easement rights have been established or usage permissions have been granted by the Ministry of Environment and Urbanization, depending on this permission, will now be under the responsibility of the General Directorate of National Parks, the General Directorate we have established. So everything will get easier, friends, it will get easier. So, we will now use the national parks like a private company, we are opening national parks like private companies. You know, "Let's do it well.

" In my opinion, we are making eyebrows, plucking out eyes, and we will do our best to plunder national parks because this does not match the facts. In fact, we understand from here that National Parks have been turned into a tourism-oriented General Directorate in a sense. National parks are no longer protected places with nature and nature, from now on they will operate as the same tourism area.
In summary, this proposal changes the jurisdictions in regions such as the Çanakkale Wars Gallipoli Historical Area Directorate and the Uludağ Area Directorate. Friends, the authority to expand the borders of these areas and to declare new regions as historical areas or connection points can now be done between two lips with a Presidential decision. Opening new areas and plundering new areas is left only to the President's signature. Previously, these decisions were taken jointly by the relevant ministries and protection boards and were concluded by combining many opinions, but now you have swept it away like a flood, destroyed it, destroyed it, and left it only to the President.
In the 24th article of the proposal, the penalties given in case of illegal hunting are relaxed. "The hunting license of those who repeat illegal hunting will be canceled and this person will not be given a hunting license again." It was said, in the new proposal, "The hunting license will be canceled and the document will not be issued for 2 years." is changed to . Yesterday, we met with Mr. Minister, and I stated that there was an ambiguity here. Friends, I do not have a document, even though I did not have a document - just like in Tunceli Pertek, where that wild goat was slaughtered - I went, it was banned.
I hunted in the area.
Dear President, this issue is important, I threw the ball to Mr. Minister yesterday, but he did not answer. As you know, we met somewhere yesterday, and I expressed my reservations about this article there too. There is ambiguity here, it is open-ended. Now, about those who have a document, he says: "He waits for two years, after the penalty, after the report is issued, he pays his money and gets a document again." I would have expected Mr. Toy to say that this regulation has been made today, which means they did not do anything, they also skipped it, or the authorized friends who prepared that law probably did not realize that we would examine it so carefully. Friends, we serve on behalf of 86 million people, we protect the rights of 86 million citizens here, and it is our duty to defend their rights in the best way possible. We read all those articles and sentences one by one, we need to read them. The signatures we will make and the "yes" vote we will cast concern 86 million people. Here is my document, I hunted in the prohibited area for two years, it says: "A criminal report will be prepared, after the report is made, when he pays the money, if two years pass, he will get a document again." Well, I don't have a document, I gave an example, I gave the example of Tunceli Pertek, the mountain goat was hunted before that. Previously, all hell was going on for a member of parliament from the opposition party - now that member of parliament from the ruling party - and he made headlines in the mainstream media. Now I'm asking: If I deposit the money later, after that report, I will receive a document.

Friends, you keep those who have a document waiting for two years, and you say to those who do not have a document: "If he pays the fine in the report, he will get the document." What did you do, how did you miss this? Did you put us in your place so that we wouldn't read or research? The friends who prepared this, my friends in the National Parks and Nature Parks who brought you the signature, and the friends in the Directorate, did they miss this that much? Or then.
AYHAN BARUT (Adana) - For one person.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Look, now, I will come there; Mr. Barut was in a bit of a hurry.
So, are you making a personal law? I wonder who you are making this law for? Friends, personal laws cannot be enacted. A law that will embrace the public and all our citizens will be enacted. I wonder whose law article this belongs to. There is no such gap.
Again, see what happens to people whose hunting licenses have been revoked and whose hunting licenses are stated in the law not to be issued again. Also, how will you issue a hunting license after two years? Why will you issue a hunting license? In fact, this man went and did something wrong, he knew the features and limits of this document when he got this document before doing the wrong thing, he hunted illegally, then you say: "You pay the money, get the document after paying the money." I swear, I'm wondering how you will re-issue your hunting license, I'm wondering on what basis you will issue it.
Again, which of those whose hunting licenses have been canceled will benefit from this amnesty-like regulation? There is an amnesty here then. To whom is this pardon, to whom is this pardon? These questions remain unanswered in the proposal, friends.
Again, look, our dear signatory deputy, Mr. Toy, said: "I realized that hunting was also done wrong, and I carried out work to protect these national parks and nature, and I brought this beautiful bill to you." Now, I will come to my own province again, we are also faced with our Tekirdağ Deputy, we are attacked by locusts from time to time, my dear MPs. Yes, there was a locust attack on sunflowers two years ago, and this year there was another locust attack in certain regions, in the area close to his own village, around Muratlı. Then the Ministry of Agriculture released partridges and starlings, our most useful birds that eat these grasshoppers, they ensure the natural balance. Now, look, while the natural balance continues in the world, we are disrupting this natural balance with our practices. Look what I said here? In Tekirdağ, we are faced with grasshopper damage and destruction in sunflower fields every two years. In my opinion, this is the point reached as a result of wild hunting and destroying nature.
We break it ourselves.
Again, look at the sunn, again, wheat - I will give an example related to my topic - there are those ladybugs related to sunn, and they also destroy the sunn's eggs. We destroy many things with our practices. I am afraid that while we are doing good things with this bill, in my opinion we will do worse because we will destroy the current national parks and natural areas. So, I am sharing your beautiful wish here as a last word.

It is our duty to leave this entrusted country of ours to the new generations in the best possible way, and at this point, it would be appropriate, in my opinion, for this bill to be withdrawn for further review. Again, there are also NGOs, other ministries and other commissions involved in this. Because it concerns the Internal Affairs Commission and the Environment Commission, but their opinions are not here. I think it would be healthy for this bill to be discussed in those commissions and subcommittees and then come to us.
Thank you for listening to me patiently.
I hope you will see our criticisms as constructive, you will look at our criticisms in the right way, the opposition criticizes, but the opposition criticizes to show you the truth.
Now, I'm going to go back a little bit and then close it. He will also challenge me here in the first meeting of the Agricultural Don Commission. My Deputy Brother from the Saadet Party is also here, our Antalya Deputy is also here, Mr. Ayhan is also here, we expressed many problems there in the first meeting. That day, our dear MP friends attacked me, they said I was doing politics, but how nice it was that we took a tour, we visited the regions of our country where natural disasters occurred, one by one, we listened to the citizens and I was the last speaker at the last meeting here - you can look at the minutes, it's okay, it's in the official minutes, you can look at the minutes too - I was happy that my friends who criticized me aligned themselves with me. I have nothing left to say. We expressed the problems and the troubles in the first meeting, but I was happy when our friends, who told us that we were doing politics and creating a perception, shared my statements themselves. I advise you to take them that way and I say, friends, let's do the right thing, let's protect nature, let's protect nature and the creatures living there are entrusted to us, they are entrusted to all of us, let's not turn a blind eye to the destruction of living things, the destruction of that nature, the destruction of our waters, our forests, and plunder.
I thank you all and offer my respects.

fields.Subject: Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308) münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Başkanım.
Bu söz konusu teklifle Tarım ve Orman Bakanlığının denetim ve sorumluluk boyutu genel müdürlüğe aktarılıyor yani kamunun ve TBMM'nin yani bizlerin bundan sonraki yapacağı denetimlerden kaçınma var, denetimden kaçırılıyor. Ben bunu anlamakta zorlanıyorum. Neden bir genel müdürlüğün kurulması ve denetimden çıkarılması gibi bir düşünce hasıl oldu, bunun anlatılması gerekiyor. Bir de "işletilir" ibaresinden sonra "ya da işlettirilir" demekle de belirsizlik ve denetimsizlik konuları gündeme geliyor. Kamu kaynaklarının ve koruma alanlarının korunması adına teklifin bir an evvel geri çekilmesi gerekiyor çünkü tamamen bu bizim TBMM'nin de yetkisi birileri tarafından alınıyor, diyor ki: "Sen denetleyemezsin, o verilen vergilerin hakkını savunamazsın." Buradan bizim elimizden denetim yetkimizi alarak bizden bunu uzaklaştırıyorsunuz, bunu anlamakta zorlanıyorum.
Yine, bakınız, Orman Bakanlığının 6831 sayılı Orman Kanunu'nda değişikliğe gidilerek Milli Parklar Kanunu'na tabi alanlar üzerinde bulunan yapı ve tesislerin yirmi yıla kadar kiraya verilebileceği hükmü yer almaktayken Millî Parklar Kanunu'nda her türlü altyapı, üst yapı ve diğer tesislerin bizzat Bakanlıkça işletilmesi zorunluydu, ne zamana kadar? Bu kanun çıkana kadar veya Genel Kurulda okeylenene kadar bu şekil devam edecek. Biz ne yapıyoruz? Yine bu değişiklikle beraber işlettirmeye yani özel sektöre veya başkalarına peşkeş çekeceğiz. Ya, Bakanlık yaparken başaramadı mı, beceremedi mi? Ben merak ediyorum. O zaman o bürokrat arkadaşları bizim sorgulamamız lazım. Bu kurum neden zarar etti veya zarar mı ediyor? Ki özelleştirmenin yolunu açıyoruz, "işlettirilir" diyoruz. Yine orada bitmiyor "...korunan alanlar için planları uyarınca hazırlanan vaziyet planı, mimari/peyzaj avan uygulama projelerinin Genel Müdürlükçe gerekli görüldüğü takdirde dışarıda hazırlattırılması..." O zaman orada yetkili personel yok mu Sayın Vekilim? O kurumlar içerisinde bu işleri yapacak mühendis arkadaşlarımız, bu avan proje çizecek mimar arkadaşlarımız yok mu? Ben merak ediyorum. O zaman demek ki devlet bitmiş, devlet tükenmiş; bu anlam çıkıyor buradan. Neden dışarıdan hizmet almak istiyorsunuz? Neden genel müdürlüğün üzerine çıkartılarak... Ve diyorsunuz ki: "Yönetmeliklerle belirlenecek." Arkadaşlar, yönetmelikler açık, kanun net, kanunun üzerinde yönetmelik olmaz, genelge olmaz. Biz burada kanunda çerçeveyi doğru çizeceğiz ama siz hep arka kapıdan dolanmaya çalışıyorsunuz. Bakın, sorduğum sorular çok açık: Bakanlığın uhdesinde bu projeleri çizecek, plan yapacak mimar veya peyzaj mimarı veya orman mühendisi yok mu? Dışarıdan hizmet alacaksınız, merak ediyorum. Bunun da açıklanmasını...
Ayrıca, bugüne kadar bu kurumları, işletmeleri işleten Bakanlığın kendisiydi. Ya, ne oldu Bakanlık işletemedi mi bugüne kadar? Ben bunu da anlamakta zorlanıyorum. Onun ötesinde, gelinen yine 6'ncı maddede millî park, tabiat parkları, tabiat koruma alanlarındaki planların gerektirdiği tesislerin "işlettirilir" kelimesiyle sizin beceriksizliğinizi ortaya koyuyorsunuz. Demek ki yirmi üç yılda, 2002'den bu tarafa beceriksizliğinizi, bu maddedeki yapılan değişiklikle ortaya koyuyorsunuz. Bugüne kadar bu millî parklar demek ki doğru yönetilememiş. Orman Bakanlığı veya Tarım Bakanlığı... Sayın Başkanım, sakın üzerinize alınmayın, buradan benim anladığımı söylüyorum bir ziraat mühendisi olarak, meslektaşınız olarak ve doktorasını yapmış biri olarak. 1991 yılından beri ben ziraat mühendisiyim, 1991 yılında mesleğe girdim. Ben burada, şu anda, meslektaşlarım adına hicap duyuyorum. Demek ki benim hiçbir meslektaşım veya orman mühendisi, ziraat mühendisi, peyzaj mühendisi arkadaşımın beceriksiz olduğu ortaya koyuluyor burada. Sizi bu konuda düzeltmeye davet ediyorum, bu mühendislerden, oradaki çalışanlardan özür dilemeye davet ediyorum. Çünkü buradaki maddede yapılacak değişiklik, orada çalışanları, kurumda çalışanları zayıf düşürür. Onları yetkisizlik anlamına veya bu projeyi yürütebilecek anlamını taşımıyor, onları şey yapıyorsunuz. "Siz liyakatsizsiniz, siz işe yaramazsınız, biz bu işi dışarıdan daha iyi yaptırırız..." O da yetmiyor, yine, Bakanlık, dünden bu kanun çıkana kadar kendi işletmiş. O zaman usulsüzlük mü var, bir sıkıntı mı var, bir yolsuzluk mu var, onu da
açıklayın, bilelim. Neden dışarı özelleştireceksiniz. Kime, neden peşkeş çekiliyor? Bakınız, sorduğum sorular net: Bakanlık bu işleri yapamıyor mu bugüne kadar? Bu projeleri, mimari proje düzenlemelerini kendi yapamadı mı?
Sayın Toy, imzada birinci sıradaki Sayın Toy, gülüyorsunuz ama bakın ne dedim?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - Bir şey konuşuyoruz da.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Ama gülerek konuşuyorsunuz.
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - Gülebiliriz, siz de gülüyorsunuz.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Bakınız, ben oradaki orman mühendisi arkadaşlarımın, ziraat mühendisi arkadaşlarımın, peyzaj mühendisi arkadaşlarımın hakkını burada savunuyorum, bu insanlara siz, bu çıkardığınız maddeyle diyorsunuz ki: "Siz beceriksizsiniz, siz yetkisizsiniz, siz yapamıyorsunuz; ben dışarıdan, özel şirketlerden paramı basarım, ben bu hizmeti alırım." Arkadaşlar, o zaman Bakanlığı kapatın, Bakanlığı kapatın. Tarım ve Orman Bakanlığını, Orman Genel Müdürlüğünü kapatın o zaman.
Ondan sonra, diğer bir konu da demek ki bugüne kadar bu kurumları siz işletememişsiniz ki o çıkıyor ortaya, diyorsunuz ki "Ben bunu çalıştıramıyorum, ben bu işi yapamıyorum, yapamadığım için ben bunu özelleştireceğim." Ya, arkadaşlar, kendinize gelin, kendinize gelin. Verdiğiniz yer, çocuklarımızın geleceğini biz burada yok ediyoruz, börtü böceğin hakkını burada yok ediyoruz. Onun için, acil olarak sizden istirhamım, masanın karşısında olan, şu anda iktidar partisinin temsilcilerine ve Cumhur İttifakı'nın temsilcilerine sesleniyorum: Elinizi vicdanınıza koyun, eğer bir ziraat mühendisi, bir peyzaj mühendisi, bir orman mühendisi, bu işleri bugüne kadar yapamadıysa onun sorumlusu ben değilim. 2002'den beri yöneten kim varsa iktidarda, sorumlusu o. Ama o mühendislere o diplomayı...
MEHMET BAYKAN (Konya) - Başkanım, lütfen, olmayan şeyleri konuşuyor.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Dinleyelim arkadaşlar.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Bakınız, Sayın Baykan, bu madde hassas bir madde ve aynı zamanda "İşletemedik, biz beceremedik, elimize yüzümüze bulaştırdık, bunu özelleştireceğiz." diyorsanız kolay gelsin sizlere. Biz bu maddenin çekilmesinin tarafındayız.
Hepinize teşekkür ediyor, saygılar sunuyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, President.
With this proposal, the audit and responsibility aspect of the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry is transferred to the general directorate, which means that the future audits that the public and the Turkish Grand National Assembly, that is, us, will carry out from now on are avoided, they are missed. I'm having a hard time understanding this. Why the idea of ​​establishing a general directorate and removing it from control has arisen, this needs to be explained. Also, by saying "or is operated" after the phrase "operated", issues of uncertainty and lack of control come to the fore. In order to protect public resources and protected areas, the proposal must be withdrawn as soon as possible, because this authority is taken over by our Turkish Grand National Assembly, and it says: "You cannot audit, you cannot defend the rights of those taxes." You are taking this away from us by taking away our control authority, I have a hard time understanding this.
Again, look, the Forestry Law No. 6831 of the Ministry of Forestry was amended and there was a provision that the buildings and facilities located on the areas subject to the National Parks Law could be rented for up to twenty years, while in the National Parks Law it was mandatory for all kinds of infrastructure, superstructure and other facilities to be operated by the Ministry itself, until when? This pattern will continue until this law is passed or approved by the General Assembly. What are we doing? Again, with this change, we will make it available to the private sector or others. What if he failed or failed while he was a minister? I'm curious. Then we need to question those bureaucrat friends. Why did this institution make a loss or is it making a loss? We are paving the way for privatization, we say "it can be operated". Again, it does not end there. ". Having the site plan and architectural/landscape preliminary application projects prepared in accordance with the plans for the protected areas prepared outside if deemed necessary by the General Directorate." Then, isn't there any authorized personnel there, Mr. Deputy? Don't we have engineer friends in those institutions who will do these works, or architect friends who will draw this preliminary project? I'm curious. Then it means that the state is finished, the state is exhausted; This meaning comes from here. Why do you want to outsource? Why by being elevated above the general manager? And you say: "It will be determined by the regulations." Friends, the regulations are clear, the law is clear, there can be no regulations or circulars above the law. We will draw the right framework here in the law, but you are always trying to get around the back door. Look, the questions I ask are very clear: Is there no architect, landscape architect or forest engineer under the responsibility of the Ministry to draw and plan these projects? You will outsource, I'm curious. Explain this too.
Moreover, until now, it was the Ministry itself that operated these institutions and businesses. What happened? Has the Ministry been unable to operate it until now? I'm having a hard time understanding this too. Beyond that, in the 6th article, you reveal your incompetence by using the word "operation" of the facilities required by the plans in national parks, nature parks and nature conservation areas. So, in the twenty-three years since 2002, you have been demonstrating your incompetence with the amendment made to this article.

This means that these national parks have not been managed properly until now. Ministry of Forestry or Ministry of Agriculture. Mr. President, do not be offended, I am telling you what I understand here, as an agricultural engineer, as your colleague and as someone who has completed his doctorate. I have been an agricultural engineer since 1991, I entered the profession in 1991. I am here, right now, feeling ashamed on behalf of my colleagues. So, it is revealed here that none of my colleagues or forest engineer, agricultural engineer or landscape engineer friends are incompetent. I invite you to correct this issue, I invite you to apologize to these engineers and the employees there. Because any change to be made in this article will weaken those who work there and those who work in the institution. They do not mean lack of authority or ability to carry out this project, you are making them something. "You are unqualified, you are useless, we can get this job done better from outside." That is not enough, again, the Ministry ran its own business from yesterday until this law was passed. Then, is there an irregularity, a problem, a corruption?
Explain, let's know. Why would you customize it out? To whom is it offered and why? Look, the questions I asked are clear: Is the Ministry unable to do these jobs until now? Couldn't he make these projects and architectural project arrangements himself?
Mr. Toy, the first in line to sign, Mr. Toy, you are laughing, but look what I said?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - We are talking about something.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - But you talk laughingly.
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - We can laugh, you laugh too.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Look, I am here defending the rights of my forest engineer friends, agricultural engineer friends, landscape engineer friends there, you are saying to these people with this article you have enacted: "You are incompetent, you are unauthorized, you cannot do it; I get my money from outside, private companies, and I get this service." Friends, then close the Ministry, close the Ministry. Then close down the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry and the General Directorate of Forestry.
After that, another issue is that you have not been able to run these institutions until now, so it turns out that you say, "I can't run this, I can't do this job, I will privatize it because I can't." Well, friends, come to your senses, come to your senses. We are destroying the future of our children here, the place you gave away, we are destroying the rights of the dirty insect here. Therefore, my urgent request from you is to appeal to the representatives of the ruling party and the representatives of the People's Alliance, who are across the table: Put your hand on your conscience, if an agricultural engineer, a landscape engineer, a forest engineer has not been able to do these jobs so far, I am not responsible for that. Whoever has been in power since 2002 is responsible. But those engineers got that diploma.
MEHMET BAYKAN (Konya) - President, please, he is talking about things that do not exist.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Let's listen, friends.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Look, Mr. Baykan, this article is a sensitive one and at the same time, "We couldn't make it work, we couldn't manage it, we messed it up, we will privatize it." If so, good luck to you.

We are in favor of withdrawing this article.
I thank you all and offer my respects.

fields.Subject: Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308) münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkanım.
Değerli Komisyon, bu 8'inci maddeyle, koruma hizmetleri ve suçların takibinde orman muhafaza memurlarının yanı sıra, av ve doğa koruma memurları ve saha bekçilerine de yetki verilmektedir. Orman muhafaza memurları, av ve doğa koruma memurları ve saha bekçilerinin çalışma usul ve esaslarının Genel Müdürlükçe çıkarılacak yönetmelikle belirlenmesi, bana göre belirsizliktir. Yönetmelikle düzenlenemez çalışmaları. Bunun kanunla düzenlenmesi gerektiğinden dolayı, bu maddenin kanundan çekilmesini talep ediyoruz. Çünkü yönetmeliklerle hiçbir yere varamazsınız. Bunların yetkileri tamamen kanun çerçevesinde çizilmesi gerekir. Ucu açık yapılamaz.
Teşekkür ediyorum Başkanım.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Commission, with this article 8, hunting and nature protection officers and field rangers, as well as forest conservation officers, are authorized to provide protection services and follow up on crimes. In my opinion, it is unclear that the working procedures and principles of forest conservation officers, hunting and nature protection officers and field guards will be determined by the regulation to be issued by the General Directorate. Their work cannot be regulated by regulation. Since this must be regulated by law, we request that this article be withdrawn from the law. Because you can't get anywhere with regulations. Their powers must be drawn entirely within the framework of the law. It cannot be done open-ended.
Thank you, President.

fields.Subject: Sivas Milletvekili Rukiye Toy ve Konya Milletvekili Mehmet Baykan ile 55 Milletvekilinin Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308)

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Şimdi, o kadar güzel, ahenkli giden bir Komisyon maalesef birden yine bir yerden dinamitlendi.
Arkadaşlar, ya biz anlatamıyoruz ya da siz anlamak istemiyorsunuz. Şimdi, Sayın Baykan, bakınız, Atatürk Orman Çiftliği kimin döneminde talan edildi, kimin döneminde kaçak binalar yapıldı? İfade ettim ama demek ki anlamamışsınız, yine söylüyorum: Bakınız, Atatürk'ün ismini andınız. Mustafa Kemal Atatürk, biliyorsunuz, Yalova'da onun bir yeri var ve orada ağacı kestirmiyor, binayı kaydırtıyor; ağaca verdiği değeri bilin. Bakınız, köşk yapılıyor Yalova'da, Yalova'daki köşke ağaç tam denk geldiği için binayı kaydırtıyor, bina kayıyor, ağaç kesilmiyor ve Atatürk'ün mirası olan Atatürk Orman Çiftliğini maalesef talan ettiniz, yok ettiniz; kaçak saraylar yapıldı, kaçak binalar yapıldı; bu yetmemiş, yine talan ediliyor, birilerine peşkeş çekiliyor.
Bakınız, algı yaratmada üstünüze yok. Şimdi, az önce Sayın Eroğlu'nu ifade etti, Sayın Bakan da hatırlar; Bin Köye Bin Gölet Projesi vardı bu ülkede. Öyle bir şaşaalı anlattınız ama gelin, Tekirdağ'a gidelim. 26 Ağustosta önüme çıktı benim. 2019 yılında Gözsüz köyüne gitmiştim, o Bin Köye Bin Gölet Projesi'nde o dönem, 2019 Ağustos ayında sulamaya açılacaktı. Ne var bilir misin Sayın Baykan? 4 tane beton kazık var. Yıl 2025, tam altı yıl geçmiş, hâlâ daha 4 tane beton kazık duruyor.
Tekirdağ'da yapılmayan barajları sormuştum geçen dönem Sayın Pakdemirli'ye. Kömürköy'de Ayvacık Barajı, bizim İnecikler olsun, Gazioğlu olsun, bir sürü baraj planlanmış, projelenmiş sözde; hepsi kâğıt üstünde. Neyi anlatıyorsun bana?
MESTAN ÖZCAN (Tekirdağ) - İnecik Barajı bitti, 1 Martta açılmış olacak.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Başkanım, Sayın Vekilim, sonuca bakarım ben, sonuca bakarım.
MESTAN ÖZCAN (Tekirdağ) - Tamam, beraber bakalım.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Bakacağız Başkanım.
MESTAN ÖZCAN (Tekirdağ) - Sen gitmemişsin oraya.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Ben gittim, önünden geçiyorum Süleymanpaşa'ya giderken. Daha zar zor, sıkıştırmayla ilerliyor biliyorsun.
Ve Naip Barajı'nda kuraklık oldu. Bakınız, Tekirdağ'ın nüfusu 1 milyon 253 bin. Sevgili Başkanımızla beraber Zirai Don Komisyonunda gezdik ve burada bir Komisyon üyemizin kendi ilinde yüzde 65 kapalı sistem sulama sistemi var, basınçlı sistem var. Tekirdağ'da ne var Sayın Baykan, bilir misin? Yüzde 6,5'lardayız biz. Vergiyi ben vereceğim, tarımsal üretimde en üst seviyede olacağım ama yatırıma geldiği zaman üvey evlat olacak; yok öyle bir şey. Sizin Bakanlığınıza da Gençlik ve Spor Bakanına da 2025 bütçesinde geçen yıl ifade ettim. Sayın Bakana yanlış bilgi vermişler, yanıltmışlar, yalancı yaptılar Sayın Bakanı. Ben de sabahında video gönderdim. Sayın Bakanım, size "Kapanmıştı, bitmiş." dediler, işte gerçek bu dedim.
Şimdi, arkadaşlar, sizin vukuatlarınız var, biz biliyoruz ama buradaki derdimiz, doğruyu yaptırmaya çalışıyoruz, doğru yapalım diyoruz. Yolda gereken Hasan Vekilimle de konuştuk, siz diyorsunuz ki: "Biz imara açmayacağız." Ya, kamu yararı düşünerek hemen ne diyor? "Planlama ofisiyle beraber, özel planlama büroları tarafından eğer kamu yararı varsa yeni yerler yapılacak." Ya, arkadaşlar, biz size nasıl inanalım, nasıl güvenelim ki? Hem öyle diyorsunuz hem böyle diyorsunuz. Daha önce Sayın Hazine ve Maliye Bakanı dedi ki: "Döner sermayeleri kaldıracağız." Kaldıracağımız yerde tekrar büyütüyoruz.
Başka bir şey daha, Sayın Tanal da söyledi, biz de söyledik, Anayasa'ya aykırılıklar var dedik;
Genel Müdürlüğe düşürüyorsunuz. Bu da kaçmak, kaçmak.
Mecliste bizim yetkimiz ne? Bütçeyi takip etmek, bütçeyi savunmak. Bizim adımıza Sayıştay gidiyor, işlemleri yapıyor; bize de ondan sonra burada onun hakkını savunmak düşüyor.
Yetimin hakkı var sayın vekillerim, Değerli Komisyon üyeleri, yetimin hakkı var, börtü böceğin hakkı var bu ülkede. Bu atacağımız imzada, vereceğimiz yetkide börtü böceğin de bizim üzerimizde alın teri var, bizim üzerimizde hakkı var. Dedik ya "Torunlarımıza, çocuklarımıza iyi bir ülke bırakalım." diye ama görüyoruz ki biz farklı şey söyledik, demek ki boş duvarlara konuşmuşuz, bütün arkadaşlarımız duvara konuşmuş ki kimse üstüne bir şey almamış ve suçluluk üzerinden oradan dönüp muhalefeti suçlamaya çalışıyoruz. Arkadaşlar, bakın, aynaya bakın, yapılmayan yatırımlara bakın, ülkenin geldiği duruma bakın. Bak, Melen Barajı ne hâlde, Melen Barajı ne hâlde; Düzce'deki Melen Barajı'na bakın.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Arkadaşlar, Sayın Aygun, rica ediyorum, toparlayalım.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Şimdi, Sayın Bakanım, ahenkli giden bir işte arkadaşlarımızın getirmiş olduğu durum...
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Hep beraber ahenge destek olalım, oldu mu?
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Eğer biz suçlanırsak suçlu buluruz. Onun için sağduyulu olalım, doğru işi yapalım, hep beraber bu ülkenin menfaatine bir iş yapalım.
Sizden istirhamımız, tekrar tekrar söylüyoruz: Şu kanunu bir an evvel alalım, diğer o 5 tane bakanlık ve komisyonlara gönderelim, onların görüşlerini de alalım, STK'lerin görüşlerini alalım, ondan sonra doğru bir iş yapalım diyorum.
Hepinize teşekkür ediyorum.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Teşekkür ederim.
Burada bir konunun altını çizeyim: Tali komisyonlar kendi raporlarını "Bu kanun teklifiyle ilgili bizim bir çalışmamız yoktur." diye bizimle paylaştılar.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Başkanım, görebilir miyiz?
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Tabii, göstersin arkadaşlar.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Ne zaman olmuş? Komisyon üyelerinin haberi var mı acaba?
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Şöyle: Şimdi, biz hukuksuz, İç Tüzük'e aykırı bir davranış sergileyemeyiz yani bu ilk defa olan bir şey de değil. Dolayısıyla, o kısmı itibarıyla çoğaltalım, verelim.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Şimdi, ben Komisyon üyesi arkadaşlarımıza bilgileri var mı diye soracağım.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Bakın, arkadaşlar, cuma günü internet sitesine konuldu, pazartesiden itibaren de bütün milletvekili arkadaşlara dağıtıldı. Nejla Vekilim "Bugün haberim oldu." dedi. Normalde aslında pazartesi günü bu dağıtım yapıldı, onun için söylüyorum.
AYHAN BARUT (Adana) - Çok kısa bir süre, bizim de söylediğimiz bu. Zaten normalde cuma günü kamuoyuyla birlikte...
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Yok, yok; Nejla Vekilimiz şunu söylediği için söylüyorum "Benim bugün haberim oldu, son dakika haberim oldu." dediği için söylüyorum.
Yani arkadaşlar, şimdi, hepimiz bu Meclisteyiz, yıllardan beri bu Mecliste milletvekilleri olarak görev yapıyoruz yani Meclisin bu tür uygulamaları var, yok değil. Doğruluğu, yanlışlığı, eksikliği, noksanlığı tartışılır; bu ayrı bir konu ama yani bunu ben özellikle belirtmek istiyorum.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Sayın Başkanım, bakınız, bunu âdet hâline getirmemek lazım, bana göre bunu sistemli olarak değiştirmemiz lazım artık. Sizden istirhamımız, sizden ricamız, her yapılan uygulamanın doğru olacak hâli yok ve bunun içtihatlara uygun hâle getirilmemesi lazım. Bu işin üstünü örtmememiz lazım, kolaylaştırmamız lazım. Biz yaparken artık geçmişi değil bundan sonrakileri doğru yapalım en azından, doğru yapalım. Şimdi, geçmişte böyle olmuş veya şöyle olmuş; eğer onlar yanlış yapmışsa bizim yanlış yapma lüksümüz yok.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Hayır, onu da söyleyeceğim. 2002'de de ben bu Mecliste milletvekiliydim, beşer dakikalık gündem dışı konuşmanın dışında kimse söz alıp konuşmazdı ama şimdi iş o kadar çığırından çıkmış ki 15.00'te başlayan Meclis saat 19.00 oluyor, hâlâ kendi gündemini görüşemiyor. Şimdi, mesela yapacaksak bunların hepsini birden yapalım, bir İç Tüzük çalışması olsun, burada boşluk olmasın. Ben bundan mutlu değilim, onu söylüyorum. Oldu mu?
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Aynı yerdeyiz.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Now, unfortunately, a Commission that was going so beautifully and harmoniously was suddenly dynamited from somewhere.
Friends, either we cannot explain or you do not want to understand. Now, Mr. Baykan, look, in whose period the Atatürk Forest Farm was plundered, in whose period were illegal buildings built? I expressed it, but it means you didn't understand, I say it again: Look, you mentioned Ataturk's name. Mustafa Kemal Atatürk, you know, he has a place in Yalova and he does not cut down the trees there, he moves the building; Know the value it gives to the tree. Look, a mansion is being built in Yalova, the building is being moved because a tree coincides with the mansion in Yalova, the building is shifting, the trees are not being cut down and unfortunately you have plundered and destroyed the Atatürk Forest Farm, which is Atatürk's legacy; Illegal palaces were built, illegal buildings were built; If this was not enough, it is being plundered again and given away to others.
Look, there is no one better than you in creating perception. Now, Mr. Eroğlu just stated, Mr. Minister also remembers; There was a Thousand Ponds for Thousand Villages Project in this country. You explained it so magnificently, but let's go to Tekirdağ. He appeared before me on August 26th. I went to Gözsüz village in 2019, in the Thousand Ponds for Thousand Villages Project, it was to be opened for irrigation in August 2019. Do you know what it is, Mr. Baykan? There are 4 concrete piles. The year is 2025, exactly six years have passed, there are still 4 concrete piles left.
Last term, I asked Mr. Pakdemirli about the dams that were not built in Tekirdağ. Whether it is the Ayvacık Dam in Kömürköy, our İnecikler or Gazioğlu, many dams have been planned and projected; It's all on paper. What are you telling me?
MESTAN ÖZCAN (Tekirdağ) - İnecik Dam is completed and will be opened on March 1.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - President, Dear Deputy, I will look at the result, I will look at the result.
MESTAN ÖZCAN (Tekirdağ) - OK, let's see together.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - We will see, President.
MESTAN ÖZCAN (Tekirdağ) - You didn't go there.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - I went there, I pass by it on my way to Süleymanpaşa. It's barely moving forward with compression, you know.
And there was a drought in the Naip Dam. See, the population of Tekirdağ is 1 million 253 thousand. We visited the Agricultural Don Commission with our dear President, and here one of our Commission members has a 65 percent closed system irrigation system and a pressurized system in his own province. Do you know what's in Tekirdağ, Mr. Baykan? We are at 6.5 percent. I will pay the taxes, I will be at the highest level in agricultural production, but when it comes to investment, it will be a stepchild; There is no such thing. I expressed this to both your Ministry and the Minister of Youth and Sports in the 2025 budget last year. They gave false information to Mr. Minister, they misled him, they made him a liar. I also sent a video in the morning. Dear Minister, "It was closed, it was over." They said, this is the truth, I said.
Now, friends, you have incidents, we know about them, but our problem here is that we are trying to get the right thing done, we say let's do it right. On the way, we talked to Deputy Hasan, and you say: "We will not open it for development." Well, what does he say immediately considering the public interest? "New places will be built by private planning offices together with the planning office, if there is public interest.

" Well, friends, how can we believe you, how can we trust you? You say that and you say that. Previously, Mr. Minister of Treasury and Finance said: "We will abolish the revolving funds." Instead of abolishing it, we are increasing it again.
Another thing, Mr. Tanal also said it, we said it too, we said there were violations of the Constitution;
You bring it down to the General Manager. This is running away, running away.
What is our authority in the parliament? Following the budget, defending the budget. The Court of Accounts goes on our behalf and carries out the transactions; Then it is up to us to defend his rights here.
Orphans have rights, my esteemed representatives, dear Commission members, orphans have rights, tiny insects have rights in this country. In this signature we will make, in the authority we will give, the creepy bug also has a hand in us and has a right over us. As we said, "Let's leave a good country to our grandchildren and children." But we see that we said something different, that means we spoke to empty walls, all our friends spoke to the walls, no one took anything against them, and we are trying to turn around and blame the opposition on the basis of guilt. Friends, look, look in the mirror, look at the investments that have not been made, look at the situation the country has reached. Look, what is the state of the Melen Dam, what is the state of the Melen Dam? Check out the Melen Dam in Düzce.
CHAIRMAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Friends, Mr. Aygun, I request you to get it together.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Now, Mr. Minister, the situation brought by our friends in a harmonious work.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Let's support harmony together, okay?
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - If we are accused, we will find ourselves guilty. That's why let's be common sense, do the right thing, let's do something for the benefit of this country together.
Our request from you, we say it again and again: I say, let's get this law as soon as possible, send it to the other 5 ministries and commissions, get their opinions, get the opinions of NGOs, and then let's do the right thing.
Thank you all.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Thank you.
Let me underline an issue here: Subcommissions concluded their reports with the statement "We have no work on this bill." they shared with us.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - President, can we see it?
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Of course, let your friends show you.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - When did it happen? I wonder if the commission members are aware of this?
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - As follows: Now, we cannot behave in an unlawful or contrary to the Internal Regulations, so this is not the first time this has happened. Therefore, let's multiply and give it in terms of that part.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Now, I will ask our Commission member friends if they have any information.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Look, friends, it was put on the website on Friday and distributed to all MP friends as of Monday. Deputy Nejla "I got the news today." he said. Normally, this distribution was actually made on Monday, that's why I'm telling you.
AYHAN BARUT (Adana) - A very short time, that's what we say. Normally, it is with the public on Friday.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - No, no; I say this because our Deputy Nejla said: "I got the news today, I had breaking news." I say it because he said.

So friends, now, we are all in this Parliament, we have been serving as deputies in this Parliament for years, so the Parliament has such practices, it is not non-existent. Its correctness, wrongness, incompleteness and incompleteness are debatable; This is a separate topic, but I would like to point this out specifically.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Mr. President, look, we should not make this a habit, in my opinion, we need to change it systematically. Our request to you is that not every practice is correct and this should not be made in line with jurisprudence. We shouldn't cover this up, we need to make it easier. While we are doing it, let's at least do the future right, not the past. Now, in the past it happened like this or like this; If they made a mistake, we do not have the luxury of making a mistake.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - No, I will say that too. In 2002, when I was a member of parliament in this Parliament, no one would take the floor and speak except for a five-minute non-agenda speech, but now things have gotten so out of hand that the Parliament, which starts at 15.00, is already at 19.00, and it still cannot discuss its own agenda. Now, for example, if we are going to do it, let's do all of these at once, let's have an Internal Regulation study, there will be no gaps here. I'm not happy about this, that's what I'm saying. Did it happen?
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - We are in the same place.

records.title: Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308) münasebetiyle

fields.Subject: Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308) münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Başkanım.
Yine, 10'uncu maddeyle, Doğa Koruma ve Millî Parklar Genel Müdürlüğünün kamu tüzel kişiliğini haiz özel bütçeli bağlı kuruluş olarak yapılandırılması sebebiyle geliri yeniden düzenleniyor. Bu da, maalesef, özel bütçeli bir kurum hâline getirilen bu Genel Müdürlükle beraber dediğimiz gibi, birçok şeyin de üstü örtülecek. Gelirlerini kendileri istediği gibi rahat bir şekilde yönetecek ama bunların sonunda da denetim aşamasında, maalesef, şu anda yasayı çıkaran kurum saf dışı ediliyor.
Aynı zamanda, bir nevi döner sermayenin oluşmasıyla beraber, kâr amacı güdeceğinden dolayı o kurumları artık hoyratça kullanmanın da bana göre önüne geçemeyeceğiz. Amaç, döner sermayeye kazanç sağlamak olduktan sonra buradaki yerler doğa ve tabiat parklarımızı bana göre en maksimum şekilde... Çünkü amaç para kazanmak olduğu için, döner sermayedeki kazancı sağlamak için böyle bir yöntem var. Bu maddenin geri çekilmesini talep ediyoruz.
Teşekkür ediyorum Başkanım.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, President.
Again, with the 10th article, the income of the General Directorate of Nature Conservation and National Parks is reorganized due to its restructuring as a special budget subsidiary with public legal personality. Unfortunately, as we said, with this General Directorate turning into a private budget institution, many things will be covered up. They will manage their income comfortably as they wish, but at the end of this, at the audit stage, unfortunately, the institution that currently passes the law is eliminated.
At the same time, with the formation of a kind of revolving fund, in my opinion, we will no longer be able to prevent the crude use of those institutions, since they will aim for profit. Since the aim is to provide profit to the revolving fund, the places here, in my opinion, are to provide the nature and nature parks in the maximum way... Because the aim is to make money, there is such a method to ensure the profit in the revolving fund. We demand the withdrawal of this article.
Thank you, President.

fields.Subject: Sivas Milletvekili Rukiye Toy ve Konya Milletvekili Mehmet Baykan ile 55 Milletvekilinin Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308)

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Az önce unuttuğum bir konuyu da bari bu vesileyle aktarayım.
Sayın Baykan, şimdi, dedim ya sizin çok vukuatınız var diye; önceki dönem Başbakanlarımızdan Binali Yıldırım Tekirdağ'a gelmişti, bizim de "PAKOB" denilen bir OSB'miz var. Bu alan tarımsal sit alanı, Ergene su havzası koruma alanı, ona rağmen... Ve yargıdayken eski Sayın Başbakan diyor ki: "Hayırlı olsun OSB'niz." Ondan sonra tabii ki iptal oldu, tekrar düzenleme yapıldı. Bir daha bilirkişiler yine geldi ve noktayı koyduk. Tarımsal sit alanı, toplulaştırma yapmışsınız, Ergene su havzasında su kıtlığı var, kalkıyorsunuz buraya OSB... Kaygılarımızı anlayın, korkularımızı anlayın; uyarımızı buna göre yapıyoruz.
Şimdi, Sayın Başkanım, ilk maddede de birleştiriliyor gördüğümüzde ve buradaki gelinen noktada ülkenin maalesef menfaatlerinin nerede olduğunu ben merak ediyorum. Bu Genel Müdürlüğün kurulmasının ne kadar elzem olduğunu anlamış değilim. Tarım Bakanlığı nasıl uhdesinden bu yeri Genel Müdürlük nezdine bırakıyor, onu da anlamış değilim. Yani kısacası, kimin yararına olduğunu anlamadığım bir kanun teklifiyle karşı karşıyayız. Bunun için sizden istirhamımız -yine aynı şeyi tekrarlayacağız- bunun bir an evvel çekilmesi. Daha doğrusu, az önce bize de verdiniz, sözde alt komisyonlara gönderilmiş ama hızlı bir şekilde cevap gelmiş; oralarda da görüşülmesinde bence fayda var ve bizim de önerimizi tutanaklardan alarak, bu kanun teklifinin bir daha gözden geçirilerek ilerleyen dönemlerde getirilmesinin de bana göre doğru olacağını düşünüyorum.
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Let me take this opportunity to mention a topic that I had just forgotten.
Mr. Baykan, as I said, you have many incidents; Binali Yıldırım, one of our previous Prime Ministers, came to Tekirdağ, and we have an OIZ called "PAKOB". This area is an agricultural protected area, Ergene water basin protection area, despite this... And while we are in the judiciary, the former Prime Minister says: "Good luck with your OIZ." After that, of course, it was canceled and rearranged. The experts came again and we put an end to it. It is an agricultural protected area, you have made consolidation, there is a water shortage in the Ergene water basin, you come here as an OIZ... Understand our concerns, understand our fears; We issue our warning accordingly.
Now, Mr. President, when we see that they are combined in the first article, I unfortunately wonder where the interests of the country are at this point. I don't understand how essential it is to establish this General Directorate. I don't understand how the Ministry of Agriculture leaves this area to the General Directorate. In short, we are faced with a bill whose benefit I do not understand. For this reason, our request from you - we will repeat the same thing again - is that this is withdrawn as soon as possible. More precisely, you just gave it to us, it was supposedly sent to subcommittees, but the response came quickly; I think it would be beneficial to discuss it there as well, and I think it would be right to take our suggestion from the minutes and review this bill again and bring it forward in the future.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Başkanım, imza sahipleri bunu maddeye neden böyle koyduklarını açıklarlar mı?
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Tabii, soralım.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Buyursunlar, neden böyle bir şeye ihtiyaç duymuşlar biz de bilelim; hasıl olsun amaç.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Tabii, tabii.
Yok, doğru söylüyorsunuz, açıklasınlar. Genel Müdürlük de açıklayabilir, Bakan Yardımcımız da açıklayabilir.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Vallahi ben, 1'inci imzayı kim attıysa ondan isterim çünkü kanunu o yazmış.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Sayın milletvekilimiz de açıklayabilir.
Buyurun efendim.
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - HGS yetkileri, HGS'yle ilgili konuyu diyorsunuz değil mi?
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Doğrudur.
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - 10 katıydı daha önce. Biz, ölçülülük esasına göre...
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Neden o öyle bir düzenlemeye geçtiniz?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - Söylüyoruz...
Ölçülülük esasına göre biz 4 katına indirdik çünkü girişlerde yığılma olmaması için, ziyaretçilerin daha düzenli bir şekilde istifade edebilmesi için -HGS'yle- doğa koruma alanlarını da daha korunaklı hâle getirebilmek için bu uygulamayı yaptık.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Başka bir amaç güdülmüş olabilir mi?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - Nasıl bir amaç? Başka bir amaç yok yani.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Ben de şeytanın avukatlığını yapacağım gene. O zaman acaba geçmişte kapıda görevliler vardı, bilet kesiyorlardı, biletlerle ilgili bir sorun mu var?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - Tabii, cevabını söyledik aslında ama tekrar söyleyelim: Doğa koruma alanlarının çok daha düzenli ziyaret edilebilmesi, ziyaretçilerin giriş alanlarında yığılma oluşturmaması için. Siz HGS'yi soruyorsanız, sebebi bu, koruma amaçlı ama HGS'nin 4 katı olduğunu soruyorsanız ölçülülük esasına göre, kara yollarına göre yapıldı.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Farklı bir şey sormak istemiştim ama.
BAŞKAN VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Bir saniye, oradan bir söz talebi var.
Kendinizi de tanıtarak buyurun.
TARIM VE ORMAN BAKANLIĞI DOĞA VE MİLLÎ PARKLAR GENEL MÜDÜRLÜĞÜ I. HUKUK MÜŞAVİRİ ALPEREN KORKMAZ - Sayın Başkanım, değerli vekillerim; Doğa Koruma ve Millî Parklar Genel Müdürlüğü 1'inci Hukuk Müşaviri Alperen Korkmaz.
Efendim, öncelikle şöyle: Bu HGS sistemine biz 4 bölgemizde hâlihazırda geçtik, 1 bölgede çalışmalar devam ediyor. Bunun maksadı şuydu: Malumunuz, Uludağ'da özellikle, gidip gördüyseniz, kış aylarında çok ciddi birikme oluyordu. Bu trafiği veya diğer sıkıntıları engellemek için insanlar beklemesin, rahat bir şekilde HGS'den geçsinler diye bu sistemleri biz kurduk. 4 katın sebebi de şudur: PTT'nin altyapısını kullanıyoruz, HGS'yle yine aynı altyapıyı kullanıyoruz. Benzer şekilde uygulama aynı güdümde ilerlesin diye 4 kata uyarladık efendim.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Chairman, can the signatories explain why they put it in the article like this?
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Of course, let's ask.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Here you go, let us know why they needed such a thing; May the purpose be achieved.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Of course, of course.
No, you are right, let them explain. The General Directorate can also explain, our Deputy Minister can also explain.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - I swear, I want it from whoever signed the first one, because he wrote the law.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Our esteemed member of parliament can also explain.
Here you go sir.
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - HGS authorities, you are talking about the issue regarding HGS, right?
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - That is true.
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - It was 10 times higher before. We, on the principle of moderation...
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Why did you adopt such an arrangement?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - We say...
On the basis of proportionality, we reduced it to 4 times because we made this practice to avoid crowding at the entrances, to make the nature conservation areas more protected - with HGS - so that visitors can benefit from them more regularly.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Could another purpose have been pursued?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - What kind of purpose? So there is no other purpose.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - I will play the devil's advocate again. Then I wonder if there were guards at the door in the past and they were issuing tickets. Is there a problem with the tickets?
RUKİYE TOY (Sivas) - Of course, we have already said the answer, but let's say it again: In order to ensure that nature conservation areas can be visited more regularly and to prevent visitors from crowding in the entrance areas. If you are asking about the HGS, this is for protection purposes, but if you are asking that it is 4 times the HGS, it was done on the basis of proportionality, according to the highways.
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - I wanted to ask something different, but.
MAYOR VAHİT KİRİŞCİ - Wait a second, there is a request for a word from there.
Please introduce yourself.
MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FORESTRY GENERAL DIRECTORATE OF NATURE AND NATIONAL PARKS I. LEGAL COUNSELOR ALPEREN KORKMAZ - Dear President, my dear deputies; Alperen Korkmaz, 1st Legal Counsel of the General Directorate of Nature Conservation and National Parks.
Sir, first of all: We have already switched to this HGS system in 4 regions, and work continues in 1 region. The purpose of this was as follows: As you know, if you went and saw Uludağ, there was serious accumulation in the winter months. In order to prevent this traffic or other problems, we installed these systems so that people do not have to wait and can pass through HGS comfortably. The reason for 4 floors is this: We use PTT's infrastructure, and we use the same infrastructure as HGS. Similarly, we adapted it to 4 floors so that the application progresses under the same guidance.

records.title: Sivas Milletvekili Rukiye Toy ve Konya Milletvekili Mehmet Baykan ile 55 Milletvekilinin Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308)

fields.Subject: Sivas Milletvekili Rukiye Toy ve Konya Milletvekili Mehmet Baykan ile 55 Milletvekilinin Milli Parklar Kanunu ve Bazı Kanunlar ile 375 Sayılı Kanun Hükmünde Kararnamede Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3308)

records.originalTurkish:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Başkanım.
Kanun teklifinin 4'üncü maddesinde "Planlama" başlığıyla değiştirilen maddenin kapsamına tabiat parkı, tabiat anıtı ve tabiatı koruma alanı da ekleniyor. Mevcut düzenlemede sadece millî parklar yönünden düzenleniyor idi fakat maddenin yürürlükteki hâli sadece gelişme planlarını içermekte iken teklifle birden fazla plan maddeye dâhil ediliyor. Buna göre gelişme planı ve uzun devreli gelişme planı olarak, iki ayrı plan olarak düzenleniyor. Ayrıca, "yönetim planı" ibaresi maddeye ekleniyor. Yürürlükteki maddede gelişim planları Bakanlık tarafından hazırlanabilirken 4'üncü maddenin birinci fıkrasına eklenen "veya hazırlattırılır" ibaresi sebebiyle uzun devreli gelişme planı, gelişme planı ve yönetim planı özerk planlama büroları tarafından da artık hazırlanacak. Yani artık hizmeti dışarıdan da alacaksınız, kendi bünyenizde yapan varken artık dışarıdan alacaksınız. Madde yürürlükteki hâlinde millî parklarla ilgili geliştirme ve işletmelere yönelik gelişme planları hazırlamak için ilgili bakanlıklardan bir olumlu görüş alınıyordu daha önce ama maalesef bu teklifle beraber olumlu görüş arama olasılığı artık ortadan kaldırılıyor.
Aynı biçimde tabiat parkı, tabiat anıtı ve tabiatı koruma alanı olarak belirlenen yerler için gerekli projelerde Kültür ve Turizm Bakanlığının görüşünü arama yükümlülüğünü de yok ediyorsunuz. Yani, her şeyi silip atıyorsunuz, sadece genel müdürlük uhdesinde ve planlama ofisiyle bütün her şeyi gerçekleştireceksiniz. Yani kısacası, yangından mal kaçırır gibi, iş denetimi bulmadan, araştırılmadan, planlamadan sadece bir ofis üzerinden işi çözüyorsunuz. Yine, Kültür ve Turizm Koruma ve Gelişim Bölgeleri ile turizm merkezlerindeki turizm yatırımlarına ilişkin planlama kararlarında Milli Parklar Kanunu yerine Turizmi Teşvik Kanunu hükümleri uygulanacak. Yani bundan sonra Kültür ve Turizm Bakanlığından turizm teşvik belgesi alan arkadaşlar gelip bu millî parkların olduğu yerlerde tesis yapma veya tesisleri inşa etmede veya mevcut olan tesisi çalıştırmayla ilgili sizlerin bu güzel çıkarmış olduğunuz kanunla beraber elleri güçlenecek. Yani artık Tarım Bakanlığını yok ediyorsunuz. Tarım Bakanlığının uhdesinden alınıp tamamen her yetki, planlar, kararlar Kültür ve Turizm Bakanlığına veriliyor.
Buradan da şunu anlıyoruz ki bundan sonra bu millî parkların göbeğine turizm amaçlı oteldir moteldir, konaklama tesisleri aklınıza ne geliyorsa çok rahat bir şekilde yapılacak. Bunun için bu tehlikeli bir madde. Bu maddenin geri çekilmesini talep ediyoruz ve o şekilde görüşlerimizi ifade ediyor ve sizleri sağlıklı düşünmeye davet ediyorum.
Teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, President.
In the 4th article of the bill, nature parks, natural monuments and nature conservation areas are also added to the scope of the amended article with the title "Planning". In the current regulation, it was regulated only in terms of national parks, but while the current version of the article only includes development plans, with the proposal, more than one plan is included in the article. Accordingly, it is organized as two separate plans: a development plan and a long-term development plan. Additionally, the phrase "management plan" is added to the article. While development plans can be prepared by the Ministry in the current article, the long-term development plan, development plan and management plan will now be prepared by autonomous planning offices due to the phrase "or have it prepared" added to the first paragraph of Article 4. In other words, you will now receive the service from outside, when you can do it yourself, you will now outsource it. While the article was in force, a positive opinion was previously sought from the relevant ministries in order to prepare development plans for development and businesses related to national parks, but unfortunately, with this proposal, the possibility of seeking a positive opinion is now eliminated.
Likewise, you eliminate the obligation to seek the opinion of the Ministry of Culture and Tourism on the projects required for places designated as nature parks, natural monuments and nature conservation areas. So, you delete everything, you will realize everything only under the responsibility of the general directorate and the planning office. In short, you solve the problem just from an office, without any work supervision, research or planning, as if you were stealing goods from a fire. Again, the provisions of the Tourism Encouragement Law will be applied instead of the National Parks Law in planning decisions regarding tourism investments in Culture and Tourism Protection and Development Regions and tourism centers. So from now on, friends who have received a tourism incentive certificate from the Ministry of Culture and Tourism will come and build facilities in the places where these national parks are located, or their hands will be strengthened with this beautiful law you have passed regarding the construction of facilities or the operation of existing facilities. So now you are destroying the Ministry of Agriculture. It is taken from the responsibility of the Ministry of Agriculture and all authorities, plans and decisions are given to the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
From here we understand that from now on, hotels, motels, accommodation facilities, whatever you can think of, will be built very comfortably for tourism purposes in the heart of these national parks. That's why this is a dangerous substance. We demand the withdrawal of this article and thus express our views and invite you to think healthily.
Thank you.
